title: Consultation - Canada.ca
content:
Effective consultation is essential to allow Health Canada to fulfil its legislative mandate, deliver programs, and launch new initiatives. Canadians are provided an opportunity to be involved in decision-making processes regarding Health Canada's priorities, policies and programs.
- Consultation on HIV Simple/Rapid Test Kits [2017-04-10]
- Consultation on Health Product Transparency Initiatives [2016-01-25]
